title: A bill to rename the medical center of the Department of Veterans Affairs in Dallas, Texas, as the "Eddie Bernice Johnson VA Medical Center".
plain_summary: This bill renames a veterans hospital in Dallas, Texas after Eddie Bernice Johnson. She worked as a nurse at this same hospital for sixteen years before becoming a member of Congress. During her thirty years in Congress, she helped many veterans get the care and services they needed. The hospital will now be called the Eddie Bernice Johnson VA Medical Center to honor her work helping veterans.
last_action_text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Veterans' Affairs.

sections.title: Section 1  Findings
sections.text: Congress has learned these facts about Congresswoman Eddie Bernice Johnson. She worked for sixteen years as the Chief Psychiatric Nurse at the Department of Veterans Affairs medical center in Dallas, Texas. A psychiatric nurse is someone who helps treat mental health problems. During this time, she served the veteran community with great care and dedication. She then served thirty years in Congress. During those years, she introduced many bills that were meant to honor and help the patriots who served their country so well. She introduced and helped pass a law called the Dr. James Allen Veteran Vision Equity Act of two thousand seven. This law helps people who were wounded while serving in the Armed Forces get the medical treatment they need. It also increases the respect and dignity shown to those who gave everything for their country. Congresswoman Eddie Bernice Johnson was a trailblazer who worked very hard to help veterans across the United States. She has earned the respect and honor of Dallas, Texas, the State of Texas, the United States, and Congress.

sections.title: Section 2  Designation of Eddie Bernice Johnson VA Medical Center
sections.text: The Department of Veterans Affairs medical center located at four thousand five hundred South Lancaster Road in Dallas, Texas will get a new name after this law is passed. It will be known as the Eddie Bernice Johnson Department of Veterans Affairs Medical Center or the Eddie Bernice Johnson VA Medical Center. Any time this medical center is mentioned in any law, rule, map, document, paper, or other official record of the United States, it should be called by its new name, the Eddie Bernice Johnson VA Medical Center.
